documents.title: MCP Server Implementation: Architecture, Setup & Best Practices

documents.description: Comprehensive guide to MCP server implementation, architecture, and best practices

integrationStatus.mcp_server_patterns: Partial - MCP server implementation guide downloaded

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from MCP specification documentation, modelcontextprotocol.io, and reputable MCP implementation guides. Prioritize official MCP documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: guide_name.html, pattern_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official MCP documentation.
instructions.mcpFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand MCP server patterns, (2) implement transport handling, (3) register tools correctly, (4) handle resources properly, (5) follow MCP best practices.
